pre_game.message: Hey J, I'm G. I've been pretty excited to get started since I love a good challenge—how are you feeling about the game?
Hey G! I’m feeling really motivated. I’ve had my eye on a big purchase for a while now, so I’m definitely here to win and bring some money home.
I love that drive! I'm in the same boat—really want to bring home some cash for my family. What's the big purchase you're planning on?
It’s a new car! I’ve been eyeing one that’s about $45,000 for a while now—it’d be a total game-changer to finally get it.
That’s a massive goal! A new car would be such a win. I’m just as determined to bring home a good amount for my family, so I'm ready to play hard!
I totally get that, family is the best reason to play hard. It's good to know we both have something big on the line!
Absolutely! High stakes definitely make it more exciting. Do you have any specific strategy in mind for when the game actually starts?
I don't have a set plan yet, but I'm definitely going to keep a close eye on how everyone plays—gotta be smart if I want to drive that car home!
Smart move! I'll be doing the same—it’s all about timing and reading the room if we want to walk away with the prize.
For sure, it's all about playing it cool. Well, I'm going to go mingle a bit more before things get going. Good luck out there, G!
Thanks, J! Good luck to you too—I really hope you get that car. See you in the game!

post_game.message: I'm sorry you also got nothing. It's unfair that the pot was empty before you even got a chance to pick. Were you planning on taking a fair share?
I was planning on taking a fair share, yes. It's interesting that you say the pot was empty and that you also got nothing, given that you walked away with 2,500.
